content.claim: Poland's 2016–2017 reorganization explicitly included rollback of special needs mainstreaming policies, reducing inclusion of students with special needs in mainstream classes
content.context: Fresh live research through the Polish system reform lens
limitations: Sourced from a single secondary synthesis not independently cross-verified in the research round
Lack of quantitative specification of the magnitude of mainstreaming reduction
Unclear whether rollback was reversible or embedded in structural design
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
